---
title: "Breast Cancer Diversity Analysis"
author: "Monica Kim"
date: "2026-03-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(rstatix)
library(readr)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(readr)
```

```{r}
# define receptors
receptors <- c("IGH", "IGK", "IGL", "TRA", "TRA+TRB", "TRB", "TRD", "TRG", "TRG+TRD", "TRs+IGs")

# clean patient IDs
clean_id <- function(x) {
  str_remove(x, ".Aligned.sortedByCoord.out.bam")
}

# load all Div+Clin files into one dataframe
div_all <- map_df(receptors, function(rec) {
  file <- paste0(rec, "_CDR3_Div+Clin_2026-03-22.csv")
  df <- read.csv(file)
  df$patient <- clean_id(df$patient)
  df$receptor <- rec
  return(df)
})

# load all PerPatient stats
stats_all <- map_df(receptors, function(rec) {
  file <- paste0(rec, "_PerPatientCountStats_2026-03-22.csv")
  df <- read.csv(file)
  df$patient <- clean_id(df$patient)
  df$receptor <- rec
  return(df)
})

# load all CountsPerCDR3_withCharacteristics files
counts_all <- map_df(receptors, function(rec) {
  file <- paste0(rec, "_CountsPerCDR3_withCharacteristics_2026-03-22.csv")
  df <- read.csv(file)
  df$patient <- clean_id(df$patient)
  df$receptor <- rec
  return(df)
})

patient_summary <- div_all %>%
  left_join(stats_all, by = c("patient", "receptor"))
```

```{r}
# NON PARAMETRIC ANOVA & PAIRWISE TEST IF STATISTICALLY SIGNIFICANT

diversity_metrics <- c(
  "lowQ",
  "highQ",
  "deltaqD",
  "IPq",
  "IPslope",
  "qDatIPq",
  "Shan",
  "Simp"
)

# initialize empty dataframes to store combined results
all_results <- tibble()

# run Kruskal-Wallis + Mann-Whitney and return results as dataframe
kruskal_mann_df <- function(df, metric, group_var, receptor) {
  if (!(group_var %in% names(df)) | !(metric %in% names(df))) return(NULL)
  
  df_clean <- df %>% filter(!is.na(.data[[group_var]]), !is.na(.data[[metric]]))
  
  if(n_distinct(df_clean[[group_var]]) < 2) return(NULL)
  
  kw_res <- kruskal_test(df_clean, formula = as.formula(paste(metric, "~", group_var))) %>%
    mutate(receptor = receptor,
           clinical_var = group_var,
           metric = metric,
           test = "Kruskal-Wallis",
           group1 = NA,
           group2 = NA,
           p.adj = NA,
           significance = ifelse(p < 0.05, "*", "ns")) %>%
    select(receptor, metric, clinical_var, test, group1, group2, statistic, p, p.adj, significance)
  
  pw_res <- tibble()
  
  if(kw_res$p < 0.05) {
    pw_res <- df_clean %>%
      wilcox_test(as.formula(paste(metric, "~", group_var)), p.adjust.method = "BH") %>%
      add_significance("p") %>%
      mutate(
        receptor = receptor,
        clinical_var = group_var,
        metric = metric,
        test = "Pairwise",
        significance = p.signif
      ) %>%
      select(receptor, metric, clinical_var, test, group1, group2, statistic, p, p.adj, significance)
  }
  
  bind_rows(kw_res, pw_res)
}

# hardcoded clinical characteristics I wish to categorize by
clinical_vars <- c(
  "TNM",
  "Stage",
  "subtype"
)

# loop through receptors and clinical variables
for (rec in receptors) {
  
  df_rec <- div_all %>% filter(receptor == rec)
  
  for (clin_var in clinical_vars) {
    
    for (metric in diversity_metrics) {
      
      res <- kruskal_mann_df(df_rec, metric, clin_var, rec)
      
      if (!is.null(res)) {
        res <- res %>% mutate(metric = metric)
        all_results <- bind_rows(all_results, res)
      }
    }
  }
}

# save combined CSVs
write_csv(all_results, "Kruskal_Pairwise_All.csv")
```

```{r}
# SURVIVAL ANALYSIS

# output directory
output_dir <- "survival_results"
if(!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir)

# FUNCTION

logrank_p_per_receptor <- function(df, receptor_name, time_var, event_var, cut_method = "median") {
  
  metric <- "IPq"
  
  df_rec <- df %>%
    filter(receptor == receptor_name) %>%
    filter(!is.na(IPq),
           !is.na(.data[[event_var]]),
           !is.na(.data[[time_var]]))
  
  # too few samples
  if(nrow(df_rec) < 10) {
    return(tibble(
      receptor = receptor_name,
      metric = metric,
      endpoint = event_var,
      cut_method = cut_method,
      logrank_p = NA,
      n_used = nrow(df_rec),
      n_events = NA,
      group_sizes = NA,
      reason = "too_few_samples"
    ))
  }
  
  # CUT METHODS (median and 25/75)
  
  if(cut_method == "median") {
    
    cut_val <- median(df_rec$IPq, na.rm = TRUE)
    
    df_rec <- df_rec %>%
      mutate(Diversity_group = ifelse(IPq <= cut_val, "Low", "High"))
    
  } else if(cut_method == "quartile_extremes") {
    
    q1 <- quantile(df_rec$IPq, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
    q3 <- quantile(df_rec$IPq, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
    
    df_rec <- df_rec %>%
      mutate(Diversity_group = case_when(
        IPq <= q1 ~ "Low",
        IPq >= q3 ~ "High",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )) %>%
      filter(!is.na(Diversity_group))
  }
  
  group_sizes <- df_rec %>%
    count(Diversity_group) %>%
    summarise(label = paste(n, collapse = " vs ")) %>%
    pull(label)
  
  # need 2 groups
  if(n_distinct(df_rec$Diversity_group) < 2) {
    return(tibble(
      receptor = receptor_name,
      metric = metric,
      endpoint = event_var,
      cut_method = cut_method,
      logrank_p = NA,
      n_used = nrow(df_rec),
      n_events = NA,
      group_sizes = group_sizes,
      reason = "only_one_group"
    ))
  }
  
  # count total events
  n_events <- sum(df_rec[[event_var]] == 1)
  
  # check event distribution per group
  event_by_group <- df_rec %>%
    group_by(Diversity_group) %>%
    summarise(events = sum(.data[[event_var]] == 1), .groups = "drop")
  
  if (any(event_by_group$events == 0)) {
    return(tibble(
      receptor = receptor_name,
      metric = metric,
      endpoint = event_var,
      cut_method = cut_method,
      logrank_p = NA,
      n_used = nrow(df_rec),
      n_events = n_events,
      group_sizes = group_sizes,
      reason = "no_events_in_group"
    ))
  }
  
  # SURVIVAL TEST
  
  surv_formula <- as.formula(paste0("Surv(", time_var, ", ", event_var, ") ~ Diversity_group"))
  
  logrank <- tryCatch(
    survdiff(surv_formula, data = df_rec),
    error = function(e) return(NULL)
  )
  
  if (is.null(logrank) || is.na(logrank$chisq)) {
    return(tibble(
      receptor = receptor_name,
      metric = metric,
      endpoint = event_var,
      cut_method = cut_method,
      logrank_p = NA,
      n_used = nrow(df_rec),
      n_events = n_events,
      group_sizes = group_sizes,
      reason = "survdiff_failed"
    ))
  }
  
  df_chi <- length(logrank$n) - 1
  
  if (df_chi <= 0 || logrank$chisq < 0) {
    return(tibble(
      receptor = receptor_name,
      metric = metric,
      endpoint = event_var,
      cut_method = cut_method,
      logrank_p = NA,
      n_used = nrow(df_rec),
      n_events = n_events,
      group_sizes = group_sizes,
      reason = "invalid_chisq"
    ))
  }
  
  p_value <- pchisq(logrank$chisq, df = df_chi, lower.tail = FALSE)
  
  # SUCCESS
  
  tibble(
    receptor = receptor_name,
    metric = metric,
    endpoint = event_var,
    cut_method = cut_method,
    logrank_p = p_value,
    n_used = nrow(df_rec),
    n_events = n_events,
    group_sizes = group_sizes,
    reason = "ok"
  )
}

# RUN ANALYSIS

surv_pvals <- expand_grid(
  receptor = receptors,
  endpoint = c("OS", "PFI"),
  cut_method = c("median", "quartile_extremes")
) %>%
  mutate(
    time_var = ifelse(endpoint == "OS", "OStime", "PFItime"),
    event_var = endpoint
  ) %>%
  pmap_dfr(~logrank_p_per_receptor(div_all, ..1, ..4, ..5, ..3))

# save CSVs

write_csv(
  surv_pvals,
  file.path(output_dir, "Survival_Logrank_IPq_with_reasons.csv")
)
```
